subcodes.first_line: O My God, My God! Aid Thy servants who are turning steadfastly towards Thy Cause, and guide those who have turned away, that they may turn towards Thee. Then bestow Thy bounties upon Thy loved ones [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی اید عبادک المقبلین علی الاستقامة علی امرک و وفق المعرضین علی الاقبال الیک ثم ارزق اولیائک
subcodes.subjects: @corruption and decline of Islam; of the Shi'ih, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @prayer for healing, @law of obligatory prayer, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
